name: Full Semester Exam Rollout
description: You are the systems administrator for the Office of Academic Integrity at Whitmore University. Provision the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, login: super-admin / admin) for the upcoming finals period. Create a connection configuration named 'Finals Week Secure Config' with password 'Finals2024!' and fallback start URL 'https://exams.whitmore.edu/fallback'. Create an exam template named 'Final Examination Template' (Description: 'Standard template for all final examinations') that includes a 'Last Ping Time' monitoring indicator named 'Network Quality Monitor'. Create and activate a user account for Sarah Mitchell (username: 'exam.coordinator', email: 's.mitchell@whitmore.edu') assigned the Exam Administrator role.
